name: Fine-Tune
description: Adapts a pre-trained model to a new task or domain by updating model weights using parameter-efficient methods such as LoRA, QLoRA, or full supervised fine-tuning, without retraining from scratch.

evidence.notes: LARS (2026) -- Parameter Efficiency Is Not Memory Efficiency: Rethinking Fine-Tuning on-Device LLM Adaptation; reduces GPU memory footprint 33.54% vs LoRA. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)
HuggingFace PEFT -- state-of-the-art LoRA/QLoRA/IA3 fine-tuning; 100k+ stars, CI, active maintenance. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)
LlamaFactory (ACL 2024) -- unified efficient fine-tuning of 100+ LLMs and VLMs; 50k+ stars, reproducible benchmarks. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)

timeline.details: Re-graded evidence from https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22783 as A (trustNumber: 85.0)
Re-graded evidence from https://github.com/huggingface/peft as B (trustNumber: 70.0)
Re-graded evidence from https://github.com/hiyouga/LlamaFactory as B (trustNumber: 70.0)
